figures.caption: Figure 1: The overall architecture of TmallGS. (Left) The distinct processing flow comprising three stages: Section A uses FSR and DCP for hierarchical tokenization; Section B employs the TmallGS Block with Per-Field QKV and Noise-Adaptive Gating; Section C performs Decoupled FiLM Late Fusion to recover explicit signals. (Right) The Error-Aware Progressive Training strategy with auxiliary supervision.

Table 2: Performance comparison on the Tmall Search Dataset. We report the relative improvement (Δ) in percentage over the production baseline (DIN). Bold indicates the best performance, and underline indicates the second best.
Table 3: Ablation studies of TmallGS. We report the relative performance drop (Δ) in percentage.
